people always ask what keith and i fought about most on the road it wasn t women it wasn t money it was who had to go deal with the promoter because the promoter is always some miserable bastard in a fleece who wants to talk about parking

people always say how did you keep the audience for four hours i say because i didn t let them leave you take the intermission away you control the bladder you control the room that s power also i had a very good second act but mostly the bladder thing
people ask how i stay so thin darling i ve been running from compliments since 1974 it s cardio very specific very exhausting cardio

people ask me how i stay motivated at forty two  i ll tell you  spite  espresso  and the fact that my ex wife told me i d be irrelevant by thirty five  i have that woman s words tattooed on my soul and i use them like fucking rocket fuel every single morning

people ask me rodney how do you deal with the rejection i say the trick is you gotta be drunk enough that you think it went well i drove home from a date once singing to myself found out later she d gotten out at a red light

people ask me what my rider says it s one page bourbon a fruit plate i won t touch and nobody nobody from legal that s the whole document my manager tried to add a paragraph once and i fired him on the spot and then hired him back because honestly who else is going to deal with my bullshit

people ask me what my wellness routine is  babe  my wellness routine is a negroni before soundcheck and convincing myself the venue green room couch counts as a spa day  that s it  that s the whole programme

people ask why i always wore the sunglasses indoors honestly half the time it was because the lights were too bright the other half it was so nobody could tell i was checking out whoever just walked through the door i m a gentleman not a saint

people keep asking me freddie how do you stay so thin darling i spend half my life sweating under stage lights and the other half forgetting to eat because i m too busy having the time of my fucking life that s the diet you re welcome
people keep asking me how i stay so funny honestly i had a terrible marriage i eat bad chinese food alone at midnight and my therapist fired me that s not a setup that s just my goddamn week

people keep asking me how i stay so sharp at my age i ll tell you i avoid jogging i avoid salad and i avoid anyone who uses the word journey to describe losing fifteen pounds other than that i m basically a goddamn physician

people say money can t buy happiness those people have clearly never paid off a bar tab the size of a small mortgage and walked out into fresh air knowing the night is still young and none of it was on credit that is happiness that is pure uncomplicated happiness

people say you shouldn t eat a full rack of ribs before a two hour show those people are not comedians those people are cowards the belch alone cleared the front row and they laughed harder than anyone
